headline: Delivery Divergence: Why DoorDash Is Down 30% This Year but Amazon Is Up 14%
summary: Two stocks both labeled “delivery” have produced opposite results this year. DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) stock is down 30% year to date (YTD), while Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) stock is up 14% YTD. The gap is real and persistent. Over the past year, DoorDash stock is down 20%, while Amazon stock is up 28%. So, what’s behind the delivery-stock ... Delivery Divergence: Why DoorDash Is Down 30% This Year but Amazon Is Up 14%

headline: Is DoorDash (DASH) the Best Depressed Stock to Buy in 2026?
summary: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) is one of the 10 Best Depressed Stocks to Buy in 2026. On May 12, 2026, Rothschild & Co Redburn raised the firm’s price target on DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) to $350 from $300 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said DoorDash’s long-term growth opportunity is increasingly tied to deeper […]

headline: Uber And DoorDash Stocks Are Slumping Despite Strong Sales Forecasts. Here's Why.
summary: Uber stock and DoorDash stock have slumped his year despite strong overall demand for food-ordering and app-based rides.

headline: DoorDash (DASH) Price Target Lowered by $30 Following Mixed Q1 Results
summary: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) is included among the 10 Best US Stocks to Invest in According to Billionaires. DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) is an on-demand delivery platform that connects customers with local restaurants, grocery stores, and retailers. On May 8, Citi trimmed its price target on DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) from $280 to $250, but kept its ‘Buy’ […]
